---
title: "Prescriptive Analytics in Accounting"
format: html
---

### Learning Objectives of the Chapter {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note title = "Learning Objectives" collapse = "true"}
::: {style="text-align: justify"}
At the End of the Chapter, Students should be Able to -

- Gain an understanding about how prescriptive analytics works

- Learn different tools of prescriptive analytics 

- Apply some tools of prescriptive analytics on real data 

:::


:::


## Decision Analysis 



## Optimization Techniques 



## Scenario Planning
